zh.lifeSummary: 當Elias Giffard於1145年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德時，他的父親Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield45歲，母親Berthe fitzPons39歲。他於大約1177年與Maud Berkeley在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1190年在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elias Giffard于1145年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德时，他的父亲Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield45岁，母亲Berthe fitzPons39岁。他于大约1177年与Maud Berkeley在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1190年在他的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: Elias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Greek form (used in the New Testament) of the name of the prophet   Elijah .  It is one of a number of Old Testament names which have come back into favour since the latter part of the 20th century.  See also  Ellis .

en.lifeSummary: When Elias Giffard was born in 1145, in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield, was 45 and his mother, Berthe fitzPons, was 39. He married Maud Berkeley about 1177, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1190, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elias Giffard est né en 1145, à Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Berthe fitzPons, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Maud Berkeley environ 1177, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1190, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elias Giffard 1145 in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield 45 und seine Mutter Berthe fitzPons 39. Er hat um 1177 in Gloucestershire, England Maud Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1190 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elias Giffard è nato il nel 1145 nel Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Berthe fitzPons, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Maud Berkeley circa 1177, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1190, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elias Giffardが1145年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリンプスフィールドで生まれた時，父Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfieldは45歳，母Berthe fitzPonsは39歳であった。約1177年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでMaud Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1190年に故郷で45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elias Giffard(이)가 1145년 영국 그루스스터실르 브림프스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Berthe fitzPons(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1177년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Maud Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Brimfield, Gloucester, England: Brimfield, Herefordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elias Giffard nasceu em 1145, em Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Berthe fitzPons, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Berkeley aproximadamente 1177, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1190, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elias Giffard родился в 1145 г. в местности бримпсфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Berthe fitzPons, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Berkeley около 1177 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1190 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elias Giffard nació en 1145, en Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Elias Giffard  II, Lord of Brimpsfield, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Berthe fitzPons, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Maud Berkeley aproximadamente 1177, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1190, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
